name: smalltalk
description: Compress agent skill files, memory logs, and specs to .st format. 90% fewer tokens, zero information lost.

interface.longDescription: Compress agent skill files, memory logs, and specs to Smalltalk .st format. 90% fewer tokens on every session start. Works with Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, Ollama — any agent that reads text.
defaultPrompt: Compress my skills folder to Smalltalk format
